'''Operation Strike Fear''', also referred to as '''NFOp-TbM-11891: Operation Strike Fear''', was a code name for a major offensive initiated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in response to their loss at the [[Battle of Turkana/Legends|Battle of Turkana]]. It had been led and brainstormed by then-Captain [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett]], who also suggested that Captain [[Xamuel Lennox]] be removed from command of the [[Pakuuni sector/Legends|Pakuuni sector's]] naval operations as a result of Turkana.

Its primary objective was to suppress [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] opposition in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]] and spread fear of the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] power. Its secondary purpose also could have been to keep the Rebellion occupied while the Empire secretly completed the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]]. The campaign was led by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']].

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] learned about the operation when [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Nogdra]], of the Imperial Corvette ''[[Bixby]]'', [[Battle in the Dellalt system|defected]] from the Empire. Alarmed by this information, Rebel [[Rebel Fleet Command/Legends|Fleet Command]] sent a newly-updated [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearhead]] [[Interceptor/Legends|interceptor]]—[[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]]—on a [[Mission in the Dellalt system|reconnaissance mission]] to the [[Sector/Legends|sector]], during which he discovered an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Naval]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] mustering in the [[Dellalt system/Legends|Dellalt system]].

==Beginning==
Due to heavy [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] presence in the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]], Operation Strike Fear began as a suppressive [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] initiative in the [[Dellalt system/Legends|Dellalt system]]. It then spread throughout the entire [[Sector/Legends|sector]] after its first goal had been accomplished—destroying the [[Rebel base]] on [[Brigia/Legends|Brigia]]. Knowing that the Empire's first target was the [[Brigia Rebel base|Brigian base]], [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] ordered its [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|evacuation]]. Despite severe losses, most of the Rebels stationed there escaped.

Following the evacuation, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], [[Raid on the Juno convoy|captured]] the [[Juno (freighter group)|''Juno'' supply freighter]] [[Flight group/Legends|group]] heading for the [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']], thus disrupting Operation Strike Fear for several weeks. When Strike Fear continued, its next targets included [[Rudrig/Legends|Rudrig]] and [[Orion IV]], which were both secured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].
[[File:Orioniv.png|thumb|The securing of Orion IV]]

==Sullustans enter the Rebellion==
Up to this point of success [[Naval Command (Imperial)|Imperial Naval Command]] prepared new special objectives for the assault on rebellious strongholds and systems for the ongoing Operation Strike Fear. The next move was on [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] wherein [[Sullustan Resistance|Sullustan resistance leaders]] had vanquished [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]], a pro-Imperial puppet government. It was decided to abduct and 'recondition' the rebellious new government prior to the accomplishment of a full military action. As the rebels were forced to disband from the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]] Sector and a Imperial garrison force had to be established at secured worlds, a new reduced and low profile battle group was specifically formed for the mission under the Command Flagship [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']], which quickly restarted operations on [[Sullust system/Legends|Sullustan Space]].
Once [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] leaders and technical staff were kidnapped, its evacuation was prepared using several [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transports]] departing from [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] to the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigates]] [[Warspite (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Warspite'']] and ''[[Negra Star]]'', which were to transport them to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for the interrogation, [[Torture/Legends|torture]], reconditioning and servitude to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

The [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]] after discovering the Imperial plan, hoping to persuade the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]] to join the Alliance and noticing that the abduction would be a prelude to a full scale invasion, quickly decided to prepare a desperate rescue operation. As it was concerned that if they used too many ships, the Imperials would prefer to kill the prisoners, they prepared a commando team aided by a single [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]], flown by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], who identified which of the [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transports]] were carrying the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]] and disabled them. [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Farlander]] then fought several waves of [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] fighters launched from the nearby frigates while Rebel transports rescued the prisoners.

After the rescue the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]] leaders were convinced to enter [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] negotiations to discuss joining the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The two sides held a [[Diplomatic Summit at Sullust|meeting]] near [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] which was interrupted by the arrival of the [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']]. [[Hamo Blastwell]] and [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], flying [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearheads]], held off the Imperial fighters until the meeting was concluded and all ships fled into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The ''Invincible's'' attack, however, turned out to be merely a diversion. While the meeting was taking place, [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] kidnapped the Sullustan leader [[Sian Tevv/Legends|Sian Tevv]]. [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Farlander]] and [[Hamo Blastwell|Blastwell]] were called into action again to disable the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] that bore him to the [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']] and hold off Imperial fighters until a Rebel shuttle conducted a boarding operation and escaped into hyperspace.

==The Alliance Strikes Back==
[[File:Cmdr_Crix_Madine.png|left|thumb|Commander Madine considered defecting to the Alliance.]]
[[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] was sympathetic to the Alliance, and with the rescued Sullustan technical staff, they devised a plan to halt the Imperial operation by destroying the [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']]. It involved the abduction of [[Cygnus Spaceworks/Legends|Cygnus Spaceworks]] technical staff, coupled with the capture of a powerful warhead. Intelligence reports indicated that Cygnus was conducting tests on a new spacecraft, the [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|''Alpha''-class Xg-1 Star Wing]], and the Rebels planned to [[Capture of Cygnus Staff|capture]] the technicians during the test. [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] and [[Sunnar Jan-lo]] flew R-22s to identify the transport carrying the technicians and then fought off Imperial fighters while the transport [[Lightning (Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport)|''Lightning'']] conducted a boarding operation. [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Farlander]] then destroyed the test facility before leaving.

The Rebels soon learned about a new warhead being transferred from [[Celanon/Legends|Celanon]] to a deep space transfer zone by the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Gafra]]'' and planned to attack it at its destination. An initial Rebel [[Capture of the Gafra|attack]] left the ''Gafra'' damaged and stranded before withdrawing. However, the freighter was still protected by a field of [[Space mine/Legends|mines]] around it. [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] in a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] cleared them out and disabled the freighter. When that was done, the shuttle [[Herald (Lambda-class)|''Herald'']] came and boarded the freighter. Imperial transports came and attempted to destroy the freighter before it could fall into enemy hands, but [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Farlander]] was able to drive them off.
[[File:InvincibleHangar.jpg|thumb|right|Rebel agents deliver the trapped cargo to the ''Invincible'']]
With a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]], modified by the captive [[Cygnus Spaceworks/Legends|Cygnus]] staff to appear as an Imperial vessel, Rebel agents disguised as suppliers delivering cargo were able to plant the warhead aboard [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']] and destroy it from the inside, thereby putting an end to Operation Strike Fear.

==Strength==
The following [[Capital ship/Legends|Capital ships]] led or took part in the campaign:

*[[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']]
*[[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Warspite (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Warspite'']]
